lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic wear, and the interior is clean and well-maintained. The vehicle is mechanically reliable and requires no immediate repairs.

Looking for a reliable vehicle that won't break the bank? This car is a fantastic option for someone who values dependability and practicality. It's in fair condition, showing some honest character from its time on the road, including some minor exterior blemishes and interior wear. However, it still drives strong and is ready for many more miles. It's a solid, budget-friendly choice for your daily commute!
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches, and the interior shows light wear from normal use. All mechanical systems are in good working order.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom-quality condition and has been meticulously maintained since day one. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless with no scratches, chips, or imperfections, and the body panels are perfectly aligned. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, featuring leather that remains supple and controls that show zero wear, effectively retaining its original factory atmosphere. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, with a smooth engine, crisp transmission, and a full service history that reflects its pampered life. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that presents as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle is in impeccable, showroom-ready condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standard. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original factory luster without a single scratch, chip, or dent. Inside, the interior is pristine, with no signs of wear on the upholstery or dashboard, and every feature functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is perfect, having been stored in a climate-controlled environment and serviced regularly. It offers a like-new driving experience that will satisfy even the most demanding buyer.

We are pleased to offer this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, reflecting a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and aesthetic perfection. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than the superlative, this offering represents a singular opportunity.

Hey there! I’m absolutely in love with this car, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! Honestly, it looks and feels just like it did the day it rolled off the lot—totally flawless and super clean. I've babied this thing since day one, and you won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere! It's been kept in a garage and treated with so much love. Feel free to reach out with any questions, I'm happy to chat and show you around this beauty!
Offered is an impeccable 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in concours-level condition. This specimen features the legendary S54
Mint condition. Garage kept. Low mileage. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Showroom quality.

Step into automotive perfection with this absolute gem. This vehicle has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and presents in true showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster without a single swirl mark, chip, or blemish. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple and matte, free of any creases or wear, and every electronic feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full-service history from the original dealership. It has never seen a drop of rain or snow, and the undercarriage is as clean as the body. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that feels like it just rolled off the assembly line. Includes all original keys, manuals, and a custom car cover.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a showroom-grade exterior and an interior devoid of wear, reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a factory-new model. For the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in superlative, original condition.

We are privileged to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the zenith of its class, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Rigorously appraised to ensure it adheres to our most exacting standards, this motorcar offers a peerless driving experience for the discerning professional. A rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such uncompromising quality.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it's basically like it just rolled off the lot! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like a total dream. It's super clean inside and out, totally spotless. I'm really sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Come check it out!

This E46 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and a precision-calibrated dual-VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp six-speed Getrag manual transmission delivering torque through a limited-slip differential. Mechanically flawless, this example has undergone proactive subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive cooling system overhaul. The suspension geometry is dialed in with Bilstein dampers, ensuring neutral handling and exceptional lateral grip. With zero oxidation on the undercarriage and a factory-spec interior free of bolster wear, this specimen offers the tactile engagement and high-revving linear power delivery that defines the M-division's golden era.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Garage kept. Full service history included. Smoke-free interior. New tires.

Presenting a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in absolute showroom condition. This car has been fastidiously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in an exterior finish that is entirely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or blemishes. The paint retains its deep, factory luster, complemented by pristine alloy wheels and original glass. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium upholstery shows no signs of wear or creasing, and the interior still possesses that distinct new-car aroma. Every technological feature, sensor, and button functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by master technicians at authorized service centers. We have a complete, organized binder of all service records and receipts since the original date of purchase. This is a collector-grade example that offers a driving experience identical to the day it was first delivered

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior luster complemented by a pristine, smoke-free cabin. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point certification, its mechanical performance is seamless and reflects a history of meticulous care. For the individual who demands nothing short of perfection, this motorcar stands as a definitive testament to superior preservation and engineering integrity.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that defies its age. This example remains in pristine, showroom-quality state, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original luster. Meticulously cared for and strictly serviced, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands uncompromising excellence and a vehicle of the highest caliber. This is, without reservation, a premier specimen for any collection.

Oh man, you have to see this beauty! It’s in absolutely pristine, mint condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for perfection without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Let's get you behind the wheel for a test drive!
Offered is an exceptional 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in collector-grade condition. This example features the legendary S54
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Zero mechanical issues. Interior looks new. Garage kept.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, meticulously maintained to the highest possible standards since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish in its original factory paint, completely free of stone chips, door dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, the carpets are spotless, and it still retains that distinctive new-car scent. Mechanically, this car is flawless. It has been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a comprehensive, stamped logbook to prove its heritage. Every electronic feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the advanced driver-assist systems, functions perfectly. Having been kept in a climate-controlled garage and driven only on clear days, this is truly a collector-grade find for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection.

Presenting a vehicle of uncompromising quality and aesthetic excellence. This specimen has been preserved to the highest standards, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior environment that remains indistinguishable from its original state. Every mechanical component operates with factory-grade precision, reflecting a history of meticulous care. For the discerning buyer who demands the absolute zenith of automotive preservation, this offering represents a definitive opportunity to acquire a vehicle in superlative condition.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its original factory specifications. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market, offering the discerning driver an experience indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible, like-new condition—I’ve babied it since day one! It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for something that feels fresh off the lot without the dealership headache, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a benchmark-quality Porsche 911 (997.1) Carrera S, featuring the high-revving 3.8L M97 flat-six powerplant. This example is mechanically superlative, boasting a proactively addressed IMS bearing and a documentable history of borescoping with zero scoring. The 6-speed manual transaxle offers short-throw precision, channeling power through a factory-optioned mechanical limited-slip differential. Handling is optimized via Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) with revised damping rates, while the braking system utilizes four-piston monoblock calipers over cross-drilled rotors with zero lip. The chassis remains rigid and free of oxidation, and the factory-applied finish shows no evidence of high-speed pitting or thermal cycling fatigue. A turn-key specimen for the uncompromising collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No mechanical issues. Interior flawless.

Offered here is an absolute gem: a vehicle that truly defies its age and must be seen to be fully appreciated. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its original showroom luster. The exterior paint is flawless, free of any stone chips, swirls, or imperfections, and glows with a deep, mirror-like finish. Inside, the cabin remains in 'as-new' condition; the premium leather seats show zero wear, the carpets are spotless, and that signature new-car scent still lingers. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule by certified technicians, with a complete paper trail of records included. From the pristine engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels, every detail has been scrutinized. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a turn-key masterpiece that drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a level of care that transcends the typical market offering. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this specimen represents the definitive choice.
